hero.description: Horizon Tech d.o.o. ezali kompani ya technologie ya mokili mobimba oyo ezali na biro na yango na Sarajevo, ezali kopesa biyano ya software ya sika na ba kompani na ba continent misato.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: Tosalisaka baorganisation kobongola makanisi ya makasi na biloko ya digitale ya malamu oyo ekosala ete mombongo ezala na valɛrɛ mingi.
points: Kosangisa technologie na matomba ya polele ya mombongo.
Kotonga ba systeme ya ntango molai oyo ekotikala malamu ntango ekipi ezali kokola.
Kosala elongo na ba acteurs kobanda na stratégie kino na exécution.

expertise.title: Mayele
expertise.description: Baekipi na biso ya multidisciplinaire esangisaka bozindo ya ba ingénieur na makanisi ya produit na ba stacks ya technologie ya mikolo oyo.
points: Ingénierie web mpe plateforme ya kompani.
Architecture ya cloud, automatisation ya DevOps, mpe infrastructure ya résilience.
AI/ML appliqué, misala ya données, mpe biloko ya IoT.

approach.title: Approche
approach.description: Tosalaka na modele ya polele, ya itération oyo esalaka ete biloko ezala malamu mpe ekitisaka likama ya biloko.
points: Koyeba: Yeba na ebandeli, makambo ya priorité, mpe makambo ya kolonga.
Kotonga: Masuwa na ba boucles ya rétroaction oyo ezali kokoba kosalema.
Optimiser: Kotala ba resultats mpe kobongisa performance na sima ya ntango.

cta.title: Omibongisi mpo na kobongola mombongo na yo?
cta.description: Kota na molongo ya ba kompani oyo batyelaka Horizon Tech motema mpo na kopesa biyano ya sika mpe ba résultats ya kitoko.

hero.title: Contacter biso
hero.description: Ozali na projet moko na makanisi? Tokosepela koyoka nsango na yo. Po na ko lobela ndenge nini tokoki ko salisa yo po na kokotisa makanisi na yo na bomoyi.

booking.title: Mokanda ya likita
booking.description: Tindá Tindá Kosolola na bato ya ofele na boumeli ya miniti 30

response.title: Ntango ya kopesa eyano
response.description: Mbala mingi topesaka eyano na kati

form.error: Likambo moko ebebaki. Tosengi yo omeka lisusu to tindela biso email mbala moko.

Lisungi mpe lisungi ya ntango molai

custom.title: Solutions personnalisées
custom.description: Ozali koluka solution oyo ebongi? Tosalaka elongo na bakiliya mpo na koyeba bamposa ya sikisiki mpe kopesa baprogramɛ ya programɛ oyo esalisaka mpo na kozwa matomba ya malamu.

section.title: Ekipi ya bakambi
section.description: Bakambi ya mayele bazali kokamba vision mpe bokoli ya Horizon Tech

hamza.bio: Mokambi visionnaire mpe architecte technique na mibu 10+ na ba software ya entreprise, spécialisé na AI/ML, plateformes ya cloud, mpe architecture ya produit scalable.

ahmet.bio: Spécialiste ya cybersécurité atyaki likebi na architecture ya sécurité ya entreprise, infrastructure ya sécurité on-prem, mpe botosi ya liboso mpo na environnement régularisé.

culture.title: Bomoi na Horizon Tech
culture.description: Tozali kotombola culture ya innovation, boyokani, mpe boyekoli ya kokoba

remoteFirst.title: Culture ya liboso ya mosika
remoteFirst.description: Kosala na bisika nyonso oyo ezali na ngonga oyo ebongi mpe kotya likebi na matomba na yango, kasi na esika te.

collaborative.title: Environnement ya collaboration
collaborative.description: Makita ya ekipi mbala na mbala, makita ya kokabola boyebi, mpe boyokani kati na misala.

workLife.title: Équilibre kati na mosala mpe bomoi na ye
workLife.description: Mibeko ya malamu mpo na konje, lisungi ya maladi ya motó, mpe limemya mpo na ntango na yo moko.

innovation.title: Ntango ya Innovation
innovation.description: 20% ya ngonga mpo na ba projets personnels, hackathons, mpe koluka ba technologies ya sika.

cta.title: Olingi kosangana na ekipi na biso?
cta.description: Tolukaka ntango nyonso bato ya mayele oyo balingaka mosala ya mabɔkɔ, ya nkolo, mpe ya innovation.

hero.description: Landá ekipi moko ya ba-ingénieur oyo bazali kotonga baprogramɛ ya sika mpo na bakiliya ya mokili mobimba. Kosala na mosika, kokola ntango nyonso, mpe kosala mosala ya solo.

process.title: Processus na biso ya recrutement
process.description: Salelá ntango na yo malamu, na ndenge ya malamu, mpe na limemya

steps.title: Kosalela
steps.description: Tinda lisengi na yo mpe tokotala yango na sima ya mikolo 3 ya mosala.

steps.title: Masolo ya ebandeli
steps.description: Kosolola na video ya miniti 30 mpo na kolobela makambo oyo okutanaki na yango mpe makambo oyo ozalaki kokanisa.

steps.title: Technique
steps.description: Interview technique to exercice pratique mpo na kolakisa makoki na yo.

steps.title: Offre
steps.description: Kutana na ekipi na yo mpe ozwa lisungi na yo ya kokota na Horizon Tech.

listings.title: Ingénieur ya DevOps

hero.description: Tala ndenge tosalisi ba kompani na ba industries na kobongola misala na nzela ya tekinoloji ya makasi mpe ya makasi.

faqs.question: Misala nini Horizon Tech epesaka?
faqs.answer: Topesaka développement ya software ya ndenge na ndenge, AI/ML solutions, architecture ya cloud, DevOps, intelligence commerciale, mpe misala ya IoT.

faqs.question: Ndenge nini nakoki kobanda projet na Horizon Tech?
faqs.answer: Yebisa biso na formulaire to email mpo na koyebisa bamposa na yo. Tokobengisa likita moko mpe tokokabola likanisi moko.

faqs.question: Ozalaka ntango nyonso na lisungi mpe lisungi ya ntango nyonso?
faqs.answer: Ɛɛ. Topesaka lisungi mpe maintenance oyo ezali na kati ya bobongisi bugs, ba mises à jour ya sécurité, mpe makambo ya malamu.
